content:
💡 unity-mcp | C#
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling AI assistants to directly interact with and control the Unity Editor for game development and other Unity-based projects.
✨ Key Features: • AI assistant integration (Claude, Cursor, VS Code, etc.) • Direct Unity Editor interaction via MCP • Tools for asset management • Tools for scene control • Tools for script editing
📖 Summary: Unity MCP is a C# integration tool that bridges AI assistants with the Unity Editor. It allows LLMs to directly manage Unity assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate development tasks through the Model Context Protocol.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
